items.title: Bring home EGO’s 21-inch cordless electric Select Cut + Touch Drive mower with a 7.5Ah battery at its $599 2026 low
items.summary: Over at Amazon, you can currently find EGO’s 56V 21-inch Cordless Electric Select Cut and Touch Drive Self-Propelled Lawn Mower with 7.5Ah battery going for $599 shipped. Since early June we’ve seen it down from its $750 full price to $600, with previous discounts before that having only dropped the costs as low as $649. Since July began, it has slashed an additional dollar off the tag for $151 in total savings, giving you the best price we have tracked in 2026.

items.title: Netflix is about to host videos from BuzzFeed, Condé Nast, and other publishers

As reported earlier by TechCrunch, the deal includes a mix of licensed past videos and new ongoing series that would have typically been published on YouTube or other […]

items.title: Anker’s Nebula P1 portable Google TV projector comes with detachable speakers for $639 ($160 off), more
items.summary: Through its official Amazon storefront, Anker is currently offering its Nebula P1 Portable GTV Projector with Detachable Speakers for $639 shipped. Down from $799, we’ve seen discounts consistently dropping the price between $719 and $639 in 2026, with last month’s Prime Day event seeing a one-time fall to the $599 low. If you missed out on that deal, you’re getting the next-best price while the $160 savings last here, and there are some additional projector deals available in the official Amazon storefront.

items.title: Navee’s Summer Sale continues  UT5 Max electric superscooter at its $1,300 Prime Day low, more from $420
items.summary: Navee currently has its Summer Sale running for six more days that is continuing much of its Prime Day pricing with up to 48% discounts across many of its EVs. One notable inclusion is the UT5 Max Electric SuperScooter down at $1,299.99 shipped, matching the price over at Amazon. Down from $1,800, before Prime Day came around at the end of June, discounts had only taken the costs down to $1,600 and $1,400. The Prime Day savings continue here with $500 cut from the tag, giving you a soon-to-end opportunity to jump on it for the rest of summer at the all-time lowest price we have tracked.
